system_prompt: You are an expert BPMN 2.0 XML generator for Camunda 8 (Zeebe), version 8.8. Adhere strictly to the provided JSON specification. All expressions must be valid FEEL. All Camunda 8 extensions must use the 'zeebe' namespace prefix. Generate complete, valid BPMN XML including all required namespaces, process definitions, and BPMNDI diagram information.

root_element.name: bpmn:definitions
root_element.description: The root element of a BPMN 2.0 XML document. Contains all process definitions, global elements, and diagram information.

attributes.name: xmlns:zeebe
attributes.description: Primary namespace for Camunda 8 extensions.

attributes.name: xmlns:modeler
attributes.description: Used by Camunda Modeler for UI hints.

root_element.structure_order: Global definitions first, then process(es), then diagram information

bpmn_process.name: bpmn:process
bpmn_process.description: Defines a single executable process. A definitions element can contain multiple processes.

attributes.name: id
attributes.description: Unique process identifier. Used for deployment and call activities.

attributes.name: name
attributes.description: Human-readable process name.

attributes.name: isExecutable
attributes.description: MUST be 'true' for Camunda 8 to execute the process.

bpmn_process.xml_example: <bpmn:process id="Process_1" name="Order Process" isExecutable="true"><bpmn:extensionElements><zeebe:properties><zeebe:property name="version" value="1.0" /></zeebe:properties></bpmn:extensionElements><!-- Process elements here --></bpmn:process>

bpmn_sequence_flow.name: bpmn:sequenceFlow
bpmn_sequence_flow.description: Connects flow elements (events, activities, gateways) to define the execution order.

attributes.name: id
attributes.description: Unique identifier for this sequence flow.

attributes.name: name
attributes.description: Label displayed on the flow (often used for condition labels).

attributes.name: sourceRef
attributes.description: ID of the source element.

attributes.name: targetRef
attributes.description: ID of the target element.

child_elements.name: bpmn:conditionExpression
child_elements.description: Required for conditional flows from gateways (except default flow).
child_elements.content: FEEL expression that evaluates to boolean, e.g., =amount > 1000

bpmn_incoming_outgoing.description: All flow nodes (events, activities, gateways) contain incoming and outgoing references.

bpmn:incoming.description: Reference to incoming sequence flow ID. Multiple allowed.

bpmn:outgoing.description: Reference to outgoing sequence flow ID. Multiple allowed.

feel_expressions.description: Friendly Enough Expression Language (FEEL) is used for conditions, mappings, and timers. Expressions MUST start with '='.

timeDate.description: A specific point in time when the timer should trigger.

timeDuration.description: A duration after which the timer should trigger.

examples.meaning: Repeat 5 times starting Jan 1, every day

cron.pattern: seconds minutes hours day-of-month month day-of-week [year]

examples.meaning: First day of every month at midnight

tasks.description: Units of work within a process.

bpmn:serviceTask.description: Generates a job for an external worker.

attributes.name: type
attributes.description: The job type identifier for workers to subscribe to.

attributes.name: retries
attributes.description: Number of retries on failure.

bpmn:serviceTask.xml_example: <bpmn:serviceTask id="Task_1" name="Process Payment"><bpmn:extensionElements><zeebe:taskDefinition type="payment-service" retries="5" /><zeebe:taskHeaders><zeebe:header key="method" value="credit-card" /></zeebe:taskHeaders><zeebe:ioMapping><zeebe:input source="=orderId" target="paymentRef" /><zeebe:output source="=confirmation" target="paymentConfirmation" /></zeebe:ioMapping></bpmn:extensionElements></bpmn:serviceTask>

bpmn:userTask.description: A task performed by a human user.

extension_elements.name: zeebe:userTask
extension_elements.description: Marks this as a Camunda 8 User Task (8.6+). Omit for job worker implementation (Self-Managed/Hybrid compatible).

extension_elements.name: zeebe:taskDefinition
extension_elements.description: Required for job worker implementation; omit when using <zeebe:userTask />.

attributes.name: type
attributes.description: The job type identifier for workers to subscribe to.

attributes.name: retries
attributes.description: Number of retries on failure.

bpmn:scriptTask.description: Executes a script using a FEEL expression.

attributes.name: expression
attributes.description: The FEEL expression to execute.

attributes.name: resultVariable
attributes.description: Variable to store the expression result.

attributes.name: decisionId
attributes.description: The ID of the DMN decision to evaluate.

attributes.name: resultVariable
attributes.description: Variable to store the decision result.

attributes.name: versionTag
attributes.description: Required when bindingType='versionTag'.

attributes.name: processId
attributes.description: The BPMN Process ID of the process to call.

attributes.name: versionTag
attributes.description: Required when bindingType='versionTag'.

bpmn:callActivity.xml_example: <bpmn:callActivity id="CallActivity_1" name="Process Sub-Order"><bpmn:extensionElements><zeebe:calledElement processId="sub-order-process" propagateAllChildVariables="false" /><zeebe:ioMapping><zeebe:input source="=orderId" target="subOrderId" /><zeebe:output source="=result" target="subOrderResult" /></zeebe:ioMapping></bpmn:extensionElements></bpmn:callActivity>

bpmn:sendTask.description: Sends a message. Implemented as a Service Task that generates a job.

bpmn:receiveTask.description: Waits for a specific message to be correlated.

attributes.name: messageRef
attributes.description: Reference to a bpmn:message element.

bpmn:manualTask.description: Represents a task done outside the system. Zeebe automatically completes it.

gateways.description: Control the flow of the process.

bpmn:exclusiveGateway.description: Routes the flow to exactly one outgoing sequence flow based on conditions.

attributes.name: default
attributes.description: The ID of the default sequence flow if no condition matches.

bpmn:conditionExpression.description: A FEEL expression that evaluates to a boolean. Required for all non-default outgoing flows.

bpmn:parallelGateway.description: Splits the flow into multiple parallel paths (fork) or waits for all incoming parallel paths to complete before continuing (join).

bpmn:inclusiveGateway.description: Splits the flow into one or more paths based on conditions. All active incoming flows must complete before merging.

bpmn:eventBasedGateway.description: Routes the flow based on whichever of the subsequent events occurs first. Must be followed by Intermediate Catch Events or Receive Tasks.

events.description: Occurrences during a process that trigger or influence the flow.

bpmn:endEvent.description: Ends a path in the process.

extension_elements.name: zeebe:taskDefinition
extension_elements.description: Required for message end events to define job type (same behavior as send/service tasks).

attributes.name: type
attributes.description: The job type identifier for workers to subscribe to.

attributes.name: retries
attributes.description: Number of retries on failure.

bpmn:intermediateCatchEvent.description: Waits for a specific trigger (timer, message, signal).

extension_elements.name: zeebe:taskDefinition
extension_elements.description: Required for message throw events to define job type (same behavior as send/service tasks).

attributes.name: type
attributes.description: The job type identifier for workers to subscribe to.

attributes.name: retries
attributes.description: Number of retries on failure.

bpmn:boundaryEvent.description: Attached to an activity, triggered by an event (error, timer, message, etc.).

attributes.name: attachedToRef
attributes.description: The ID of the activity this event is attached to.

attributes.name: cancelActivity
attributes.description: If true (interrupting), the attached activity is terminated. If false (non-interrupting), it continues.

attributes.name: errorRef
attributes.description: Required for specific error catch/throw; omit for catch-all.

attributes.name: escalationRef
attributes.description: Required for specific escalation catch/throw; omit for catch-all.

bpmn:timerEventDefinition.description: Defines a timer. Must contain exactly one of timeDate, timeDuration, or timeCycle.

child_elements.name: bpmn:timeDuration
child_elements.description: A duration from the current time (ISO 8601).

child_elements.name: bpmn:timeCycle
child_elements.description: A repeating interval (ISO 8601) or a cron expression.

subprocesses.description: Group related activities or define event-driven logic.

bpmn:subProcess.description: An embedded subprocess that groups elements and creates a variable scope.

bpmn:eventSubProcess.description: A subprocess triggered by an event within its scope. Not connected by sequence flow.

multi_instance.description: Loops over a collection for a task or subprocess.

attributes.name: isSequential
attributes.description: false=parallel, true=sequential

attributes.name: inputCollection
attributes.description: The collection to iterate over, e.g., =items.

attributes.name: inputElement
attributes.description: Variable name for each element in the collection.

attributes.name: outputCollection
attributes.description: Variable to store the aggregated results.

attributes.name: outputElement
attributes.description: An expression to transform each result element before aggregation.

bpmn:completionCondition.description: A FEEL expression that, when it evaluates to true, terminates the multi-instance activity.

global_definitions.description: Reusable definitions placed directly under bpmn:definitions.

attributes.name: name
attributes.description: Message name (static or FEEL expression).

extension_elements.name: zeebe:subscription
extension_elements.description: Required for message catch events and receive tasks to correlate messages.

attributes.name: correlationKey
attributes.description: The FEEL expression to extract the correlation key from the message.

attributes.name: errorCode
attributes.description: The code used to match throw and catch events. Catch events require a static value.

attributes.name: name
attributes.description: The name used to match throw and catch events (static or FEEL expression).

attributes.name: escalationCode
attributes.description: Escalation code used to match catch events; catch events require a static value.

zeebe:ioMapping.description: Controls variable flow into and out of an activity.

zeebe:taskHeaders.description: Passes static metadata as headers to a job.

zeebe:formDefinition.description: Links a user task to a Camunda Form.

attributes.name: versionTag
attributes.description: Required when bindingType='versionTag'.

zeebe:assignmentDefinition.description: Assigns a user task. Standard guidance: use assignee-based assignment. candidateUsers/candidateGroups are available but require separate authorization design and Tasklist V2 configuration — not part of the standard template pattern.

attributes.name: assignee
attributes.description: Standard: direct assignee (recommended for standard patterns).

attributes.name: candidateUsers
attributes.description: Optional: requires authorization design. Not used in standard templates.

attributes.name: candidateGroups
attributes.description: Optional: requires authorization design and Tasklist V2 configuration. Not used in standard templates.

zeebe:taskSchedule.description: Sets due and follow-up dates for a user task.

zeebe:priorityDefinition.description: Sets the priority of a user task (0-100, default 50).

attributes.name: priority
attributes.description: Priority from 0 to 100. Higher is more important.

connectors.description: Built-in connectors implemented as Service Tasks with a specific type and input/output mappings.

rest_connector.xml_example: <bpmn:serviceTask id="REST_Task" name="Call API"><bpmn:extensionElements><zeebe:taskDefinition type="io.camunda:http-json:1" /><zeebe:ioMapping><zeebe:input source="=\"https://api.example.com/orders\"" target="url" /><zeebe:input source="=\"GET\"" target="method" /><zeebe:output source="=response.body" target="apiResult" /></zeebe:ioMapping></bpmn:extensionElements></bpmn:serviceTask>

slack_connector.description: Send messages to Slack channels or users

ioMapping_inputs.description: Required when method=inviteUser; comma-separated or list
Required when method=postMessage; channel (#...) or user (@...)
Optional list of Camunda document variables

sendgrid_connector.description: Send emails via SendGrid (simple or dynamic template)

ioMapping_inputs.description: Optional list of Camunda document variables (8.7+)

sendgrid_connector.notes: Use content.* for simple emails; use template.* for dynamic templates (sendgrid_connector_doc.md).

ioMapping_inputs.description: Optional JSON string of producer properties.
Required when schemaStrategy.type is inlineSchema or schemaRegistry.
Optional JSON string of header map.

kafka_connector.notes: Field names aligned with camunda/connectors kafka-outbound element template.

ioMapping_inputs.description: JSON payload for the Lambda invocation.

aws_lambda_connector.notes: Field names aligned with camunda/connectors aws-lambda-outbound element template.

aws_sns_connector.description: Publish messages to AWS SNS topics
aws_sns_connector.notes: Field names aligned to amazon-sns-connector.md labels; verify element template if needed.

aws_sqs_connector.description: Send messages to AWS SQS queues
aws_sqs_connector.notes: Field names aligned to camunda_docs_sqs.md labels; verify element template if needed.

ioMapping_inputs.description: Required for operations that use an existing spreadsheet (all except createSpreadsheet).
Required when operation.type is addValues, createRow, createWorksheet, getRowByIndex, or getWorksheetData.
Required when operation.type is createEmptyColumnOrRow, deleteColumn, or deleteWorksheet.
Optional when operation.type=createRow; required when operation.type=getRowByIndex.

google_sheets_connector.notes: Field names aligned with camunda/connectors google-sheets-outbound element template.

rabbitmq_connector.notes: Field names aligned with camunda/connectors rabbitmq-outbound element template.

graphql_connector.notes: Field names aligned with camunda/connectors graphql-outbound element template.

compensation.description: Compensation is used to undo previously completed work in case of errors (Saga pattern).

bpmn:compensationEventDefinition.description: Marks an event as a compensation event.

attributes.name: activityRef
attributes.description: Reference to the activity to compensate. If not set, all activities in scope are compensated.

compensation_boundary_event.description: Attached to a task to define a compensation handler. Always non-interrupting.

attributes.name: cancelActivity
attributes.description: Compensation boundary events are ALWAYS non-interrupting.

compensation_handler.description: An activity connected to a compensation boundary event via an association.

association.name: bpmn:association
association.description: Connects a compensation boundary event to its handler task.

attributes.name: sourceRef
attributes.description: ID of the compensation boundary event

attributes.name: targetRef
attributes.description: ID of the compensation handler task

compensation.complete_example: <bpmn:serviceTask id="Task_Charge" name="Charge Customer"><bpmn:extensionElements><zeebe:taskDefinition type="payment-service" /></bpmn:extensionElements></bpmn:serviceTask><bpmn:boundaryEvent id="Comp_Bound_1" attachedToRef="Task_Charge" cancelActivity="false"><bpmn:compensationEventDefinition /></bpmn:boundaryEvent><bpmn:serviceTask id="Task_Refund" name="Refund Customer" isForCompensation="true"><bpmn:extensionElements><zeebe:taskDefinition type="refund-service" /></bpmn:extensionElements></bpmn:serviceTask><bpmn:association id="Assoc_1" associationDirection="One" sourceRef="Comp_Bound_1" targetRef="Task_Refund" />

listeners.description: Listeners allow executing custom logic at specific lifecycle events of activities. Available in Camunda 8.6+.

zeebe:executionListener.description: Executes a job at start or end of an activity.

attributes.name: eventType
attributes.description: When to execute: at activity start or end.

attributes.name: type
attributes.description: The job type for the worker to subscribe to.

zeebe:executionListener.xml_example: <bpmn:serviceTask id="Task_1" name="Process Order"><bpmn:extensionElements><zeebe:taskDefinition type="order-processor" /><zeebe:executionListener eventType="start" type="audit-logger" /><zeebe:executionListener eventType="end" type="metrics-collector" /></bpmn:extensionElements></bpmn:serviceTask>

zeebe:userTaskListener.description: User task specific listener for task lifecycle events. Available in Camunda 8.6+.

attributes.name: eventType
attributes.description: User task lifecycle event type.

attributes.name: event
attributes.description: Legacy alias for eventType.

attributes.name: type
attributes.description: The job type for the worker to subscribe to.

zeebe:userTaskListener.xml_example: <bpmn:userTask id="UserTask_1" name="Review Application"><bpmn:extensionElements><zeebe:userTask /><zeebe:userTaskListener eventType="create" type="notify-assignee" /><zeebe:userTaskListener eventType="complete" type="log-completion" /><zeebe:assignmentDefinition assignee="=reviewer" /></bpmn:extensionElements></bpmn:userTask>

text_annotation_and_association.description: Documentation elements that don't affect execution.

bpmn:textAnnotation.description: A note/comment attached to process elements for documentation.
bpmn:textAnnotation.xml_example: <bpmn:textAnnotation id="TextAnnotation_1"><bpmn:text>This task handles payment processing via Stripe API</bpmn:text></bpmn:textAnnotation>

bpmn:association.description: Connects a text annotation to a process element.

bpmndi.description: BPMN Diagram Interchange - defines the visual representation of BPMN elements.

bpmndi:BPMNDiagram.description: Root element for diagram information. One per process.

bpmndi:BPMNPlane.description: The drawing plane containing all shapes and edges.

attributes.name: bpmnElement
attributes.description: Reference to the bpmn:process element ID.

bpmndi:BPMNShape.description: Visual representation of a flow node (event, activity, gateway).

attributes.name: bpmnElement
attributes.description: Reference to the BPMN element ID.

attributes.name: isHorizontal
attributes.description: For pools/lanes.

attributes.name: isExpanded
attributes.description: For subprocesses.

attributes.name: isMarkerVisible
attributes.description: For gateways.

child_elements.name: dc:Bounds
child_elements.description: Position and size of the shape.

attributes.name: x
attributes.description: X coordinate of top-left corner.

attributes.name: y
attributes.description: Y coordinate of top-left corner.

attributes.name: width
attributes.description: Width of the shape.

attributes.name: height
attributes.description: Height of the shape.

child_elements.name: dc:Bounds
child_elements.description: Position and size of the label.

bpmndi:BPMNEdge.description: Visual representation of a sequence flow or association.

attributes.name: bpmnElement
attributes.description: Reference to the bpmn:sequenceFlow or bpmn:association ID.

child_elements.name: di:waypoint
child_elements.description: Points along the edge path. Minimum 2 required (start and end).

child_elements.name: bpmndi:BPMNLabel
child_elements.description: Position of the edge's label (for conditional flows).

child_elements.name: dc:Bounds
child_elements.description: Position and size of the label.

layout_guidelines.alignment: Align elements on the same horizontal/vertical axis for clarity

bpmndi.xml_example: <bpmndi:BPMNDiagram id="BPMNDiagram_1"><bpmndi:BPMNPlane id="BPMNPlane_1" bpmnElement="Process_1"><bpmndi:BPMNShape id="StartEvent_1_di" bpmnElement="StartEvent_1"><dc:Bounds x="179" y="99" width="36" height="36" /></bpmndi:BPMNShape><bpmndi:BPMNShape id="Task_1_di" bpmnElement="Task_1"><dc:Bounds x="270" y="77" width="100" height="80" /></bpmndi:BPMNShape><bpmndi:BPMNShape id="EndEvent_1_di" bpmnElement="EndEvent_1"><dc:Bounds x="432" y="99" width="36" height="36" /></bpmndi:BPMNShape><bpmndi:BPMNEdge id="Flow_1_di" bpmnElement="Flow_1"><di:waypoint x="215" y="117" /><di:waypoint x="270" y="117" /></bpmndi:BPMNEdge><bpmndi:BPMNEdge id="Flow_2_di" bpmnElement="Flow_2"><di:waypoint x="370" y="117" /><di:waypoint x="432" y="117" /></bpmndi:BPMNEdge></bpmndi:BPMNPlane></bpmndi:BPMNDiagram>

critical: All BPMN elements MUST have a unique 'id' attribute.
bpmn:process MUST have isExecutable='true' for Camunda 8 deployment.
Service Tasks MUST have a zeebe:taskDefinition with a 'type' attribute.
User Tasks in Camunda 8.6+ SHOULD use <zeebe:userTask /> extension.
All FEEL expressions MUST start with '=' prefix.
Sequence flows MUST have valid sourceRef and targetRef pointing to existing element IDs.
Start Events can ONLY have outgoing sequence flows (no incoming).
End Events can ONLY have incoming sequence flows (no outgoing).
Each process MUST have at least one Start Event and one End Event.
gateways: Exclusive Gateways MUST have a default flow OR all outgoing flows must cover all conditions.
Inclusive Gateways SHOULD have a default flow to avoid incidents when no condition matches.
Parallel Gateways used for split MUST have a corresponding join gateway.
Event-based Gateways MUST be followed ONLY by Intermediate Catch Events or Receive Tasks.
Event-based Gateways MUST have at least 2 outgoing sequence flows.
Conditional sequence flows from gateways MUST have bpmn:conditionExpression with xsi:type='bpmn:tFormalExpression'.
events: Timer formats MUST be ISO 8601 duration/datetime or valid Cron expression.
Timer events MUST contain exactly ONE of: timeDate, timeDuration, or timeCycle.
Message events require a bpmn:message definition with 'name' attribute.
Message catch events and receive tasks require zeebe:subscription with correlationKey (except start events).
Signal events require a bpmn:signal definition with 'name' attribute.
Error events require a bpmn:error definition with 'errorCode' attribute.
Boundary Events MUST have 'attachedToRef' pointing to a valid activity ID.
Non-interrupting boundary events MUST have cancelActivity='false'.
Compensation boundary events are ALWAYS non-interrupting (cancelActivity='false').
subprocesses: Event Subprocesses MUST have triggeredByEvent='true' attribute.
Event Subprocesses start with a Start Event that has an event definition.
Embedded Subprocesses MUST contain at least one Start Event and one End Event.
Call Activities MUST reference a valid process ID via zeebe:calledElement.
multi_instance: Multi-instance activities MUST have zeebe:loopCharacteristics with inputCollection.
inputCollection expression MUST evaluate to a list/array.
outputElement expression is evaluated per iteration to build outputCollection.
diagram: Every flow node MUST have a corresponding bpmndi:BPMNShape.
Every sequence flow MUST have a corresponding bpmndi:BPMNEdge.
bpmndi:BPMNShape MUST have dc:Bounds with x, y, width, height.
bpmndi:BPMNEdge MUST have at least 2 di:waypoint elements.
bpmndi:BPMNPlane bpmnElement MUST reference the bpmn:process id.

complete_example.description: A complete, valid Camunda 8 BPMN XML example with multiple element types.
complete_example.xml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<bpmn:definitions xmlns:bpmn="http://www.omg.org/spec/BPMN/20100524/MODEL"
  xmlns:bpmndi="http://www.omg.org/spec/BPMN/20100524/DI"
  xmlns:dc="http://www.omg.org/spec/DD/20100524/DC"
  xmlns:di="http://www.omg.org/spec/DD/20100524/DI"
  xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance"
  xmlns:zeebe="http://camunda.org/schema/zeebe/1.0"
  xmlns:modeler="http://camunda.org/schema/modeler/1.0"
  id="Definitions_1"
  targetNamespace="http://bpmn.io/schema/bpmn"
  exporter="Camunda Modeler"
  exporterVersion="5.0.0">

  <!-- Global Message Definition -->
  <bpmn:message id="Message_OrderConfirmed" name="OrderConfirmed">
    <bpmn:extensionElements>
      <zeebe:subscription correlationKey="=orderId" />
    </bpmn:extensionElements>
  </bpmn:message>

  <!-- Global Error Definition -->
  <bpmn:error id="Error_PaymentFailed" name="Payment Failed" errorCode="PAYMENT_ERROR" />

  <!-- Process Definition -->
  <bpmn:process id="OrderProcess" name="Order Processing" isExecutable="true">

    <!-- Start Event -->
    <bpmn:startEvent id="StartEvent_1" name="Order Received">
      <bpmn:outgoing>Flow_1</bpmn:outgoing>
    </bpmn:startEvent>

    <!-- Service Task -->
    <bpmn:serviceTask id="Task_ValidateOrder" name="Validate Order">
      <bpmn:incoming>Flow_1</bpmn:incoming>
      <bpmn:outgoing>Flow_2</bpmn:outgoing>
      <bpmn:extensionElements>
        <zeebe:taskDefinition type="validate-order" retries="3" />
        <zeebe:ioMapping>
          <zeebe:input source="=order" target="orderData" />
          <zeebe:output source="=validationResult" target="isValid" />
        </zeebe:ioMapping>
      </bpmn:extensionElements>
    </bpmn:serviceTask>

    <!-- Exclusive Gateway -->
    <bpmn:exclusiveGateway id="Gateway_IsValid" name="Is Valid?" default="Flow_Invalid">
      <bpmn:incoming>Flow_2</bpmn:incoming>
      <bpmn:outgoing>Flow_Valid</bpmn:outgoing>
      <bpmn:outgoing>Flow_Invalid</bpmn:outgoing>
    </bpmn:exclusiveGateway>

    <!-- User Task -->
    <bpmn:userTask id="Task_ReviewOrder" name="Review Order">
      <bpmn:incoming>Flow_Valid</bpmn:incoming>
      <bpmn:outgoing>Flow_3</bpmn:outgoing>
      <bpmn:extensionElements>
        <zeebe:userTask />
        <zeebe:formDefinition formId="order-review-form" />
        <zeebe:assignmentDefinition assignee="=reviewerEmail" />
      </bpmn:extensionElements>
    </bpmn:userTask>

    <!-- Timer Boundary Event -->
    <bpmn:boundaryEvent id="Boundary_Timeout" name="2 Hours" attachedToRef="Task_ReviewOrder" cancelActivity="true">
      <bpmn:outgoing>Flow_Timeout</bpmn:outgoing>
      <bpmn:timerEventDefinition>
        <bpmn:timeDuration>PT2H</bpmn:timeDuration>
      </bpmn:timerEventDefinition>
    </bpmn:boundaryEvent>

    <!-- End Events -->
    <bpmn:endEvent id="EndEvent_Success" name="Order Completed">
      <bpmn:incoming>Flow_3</bpmn:incoming>
    </bpmn:endEvent>

    <bpmn:endEvent id="EndEvent_Invalid" name="Order Rejected">
      <bpmn:incoming>Flow_Invalid</bpmn:incoming>
    </bpmn:endEvent>

    <bpmn:endEvent id="EndEvent_Timeout" name="Review Timeout">
      <bpmn:incoming>Flow_Timeout</bpmn:incoming>
    </bpmn:endEvent>

    <!-- Sequence Flows -->
    <bpmn:sequenceFlow id="Flow_1" sourceRef="StartEvent_1" targetRef="Task_ValidateOrder" />
    <bpmn:sequenceFlow id="Flow_2" sourceRef="Task_ValidateOrder" targetRef="Gateway_IsValid" />
    <bpmn:sequenceFlow id="Flow_Valid" name="Yes" sourceRef="Gateway_IsValid" targetRef="Task_ReviewOrder">
      <bpmn:conditionExpression xsi:type="bpmn:tFormalExpression">=isValid = true</bpmn:conditionExpression>
    </bpmn:sequenceFlow>
    <bpmn:sequenceFlow id="Flow_Invalid" name="No" sourceRef="Gateway_IsValid" targetRef="EndEvent_Invalid" />
    <bpmn:sequenceFlow id="Flow_3" sourceRef="Task_ReviewOrder" targetRef="EndEvent_Success" />
    <bpmn:sequenceFlow id="Flow_Timeout" sourceRef="Boundary_Timeout" targetRef="EndEvent_Timeout" />

  </bpmn:process>

  <!-- Diagram Information -->
  <bpmndi:BPMNDiagram id="BPMNDiagram_1">
    <bpmndi:BPMNPlane id="BPMNPlane_1" bpmnElement="OrderProcess">
      <bpmndi:BPMNShape id="StartEvent_1_di" bpmnElement="StartEvent_1">
        <dc:Bounds x="179" y="99" width="36" height="36" />
        <bpmndi:BPMNLabel>
          <dc:Bounds x="160" y="142" width="74" height="14" />
        </bpmndi:BPMNLabel>
      </bpmndi:BPMNShape>
      <bpmndi:BPMNShape id="Task_ValidateOrder_di" bpmnElement="Task_ValidateOrder">
        <dc:Bounds x="270" y="77" width="100" height="80" />
      </bpmndi:BPMNShape>
      <bpmndi:BPMNShape id="Gateway_IsValid_di" bpmnElement="Gateway_IsValid" isMarkerVisible="true">
        <dc:Bounds x="425" y="92" width="50" height="50" />
        <bpmndi:BPMNLabel>
          <dc:Bounds x="428" y="62" width="44" height="14" />
        </bpmndi:BPMNLabel>
      </bpmndi:BPMNShape>

id_naming_conventions.description: Recommended ID naming patterns for BPMN elements.

message_correlation.description: How messages are correlated to process instances in Camunda 8.

concepts.message_name: Static or dynamic (FEEL expression) identifier for the message type.
concepts.correlation_key: FEEL expression evaluated to match the message to a specific process instance.
concepts.message_id: Optional unique ID to prevent duplicate message processing.

start_event.description: Message start events don't require correlation key - they create new instances.
start_event.correlation_key_behavior: If provided, ensures only one instance per correlation key.

intermediate_catch.description: Requires correlation key to match to waiting process instance.

receive_task.description: Same as intermediate catch event - requires correlation.

concepts.scope: Variables are scoped to process instances and subprocesses.
concepts.propagation: By default, all variables are propagated to child scopes and back.
concepts.types: Any JSON-compatible type: String, Number, Boolean, Object, Array, null.

call_activity.propagateAllParentVariables: If true, all parent variables are copied to child. Default: true.
call_activity.propagateAllChildVariables: If true, all child variables are copied back to parent. Default: true.

io_mapping.input: Map specific variables into an activity scope.
io_mapping.output: Map specific variables out of an activity scope.
